creator: n.h.bergboer@tn.utwente.nl
text:
It's different from calendar(1) in that it allows different advance
warning times for all events and in that is distinguishes between
birthdays (giving messages like: John Doe is 36 years old in 12 days)
and events (Holidays in 8 days).

It does have an overlap with calendar, but I think this overlap is not
large enough to regard calendar(1) and birthday(1) as the same programs.

Niek
